meaning: n.四部曲,(古希腊)四联剧,四部剧
examples: Tetralogy of fallot; Radical correction; Complex congenital heart disease.
Objective TO summarize the experience of surgical treatment of tetralogy of Fallot (TOF) with anomalous coronary artery.
Objective To explore the indications and results of the operations by transatrial and pulmonary repair of tetralogy of Fallot.
